arts.ttl: Outstanding Leeds star tipped to “leave the club” in the January transfer window
arts.sum: Leeds could face a notable setback in the upcoming January transfer window, with reports suggesting that left-back Junior Firpo may depart Elland Road. The 28-year-old has been a key figure in Daniel Farke’s side this season, but with his contract set to expire next summer, speculation around his future is intensifying. Carlton Palmer on Junior […] The post Outstanding Leeds star tipped to “leave the club” in the January transfer window appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke details interesting Leeds United January transfer wish
arts.sum: Leeds United are just over a month away from the start of the January transfer window and while Daniel Farke is coy on the club’s plans, he knows the re-shaped recruitment structure is working behind the scenes. “Not much ongoing, also I expect a pretty quiet January, of course you have to stay awake in that case there’s a big injury, like for example we had Ethan (Ampadu) and Ilia (Gruev), we had to react more or less a bit spontaneous.

arts.ttl: Preview: Blackburn Rovers vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Blackburn Rovers and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Leeds United options for Blackburn Rovers as scan results and patience needed after injury update
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke says he is hopeful he can call upon Sam Byram for this weekend's trip to Blackburn Rovers, highlighting the defender's importance to his team. Byram opened the scoring for Leeds in the 3-0 victory over Luton Town on Wednesday evening, but then hobbled out the game with a hamstring injury to be replaced by Max Wober on 59 minutes.

arts.ttl: Leeds team news: Byram fitness test, Ramazani won’t start
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to Blackburn Rovers on Saturday afternoon look for their fourth win on the bounce, but have some injury and fitness concerns to deal with once more. Leeds team news pre-Blackburn: Sam Byram late fitness test

arts.ttl: 'Manager spoke to me' Keeping benched Leeds players happy is a Farke dilemma
arts.sum: “The manager spoke to me before the game and I've always got to be happy with his decisions. “He makes the decisions and we've got a lot of players back fit now,” he said.

arts.ttl: Blackburn vs Leeds predictions: Rovers may struggle to contain Whites' attack
arts.sum: Leeds have been a little inconsistent on the road so far but Gareth Freeman feels their recent form is good enough to give them confidence of a win at Blackburn with room to spare

arts.ttl: Arte et Labore: Teesside triumph, January transfers and unseen John Eustace work
arts.sum: Elliott Jackson and Ryan Hildred are back to reflect on a brilliant win for Blackburn Rovers

arts.ttl: John Eustace's 'evolving' claim that should excite Blackburn Rovers fans
arts.sum: The Blackburn Rovers head coach believes his team have proven they can match most teams in the Championship

arts.ttl: Blackburn v Leeds: Andi Weimann ruled out
arts.sum: Leeds United make the trip down to Ewood Park to face Blackburn Rovers this weekend, but the hosts will be without top scorer Andreas Weimann for the Saturday afternoon fixture. Leeds will be aiming for their fourth successive win this Saturday when they travel to Blackburn Rovers in the afternoon, knowing that at least one of their rivals is dropping points this weekend.
